name: School of Information and Communication Technology
description: The digital frontier of PCC, focusing on software engineering, system networks, and creative multimedia production.

highlights.title: IT Week 2025: The Grand Finale
highlights.text: The SOICT community gathered for the IT Week 2025 Awarding Ceremony, marking the final chapter of a week filled with creativity, skill, and spirited competition. When ITSians cheer, they don't just bring noise, they make extraordinary history.

highlights.title: Futuristic Fashion Runway
highlights.text: Students stepped into the spotlight with bold concepts and striking designs, turning the SOICT stage into a showcase of innovation, vision, and style.

highlights.title: OIQAG Institutional Evaluation
highlights.text: Passi City College warmly welcomed the esteemed evaluators from the Office of Institutional Quality Assurance and Governance (OIQAG) on October 28, 2025.

name: School of Criminal Justice
description: Excellence in law enforcement training, criminalistics, and public safety leadership.
achievements: Consistent High Passing Rate in Licensure Examinations
Top Performing Delegates in Regional Security Operations

highlights.title: Criminology Week 2024: Unleash the Justice
highlights.text: From Nov. 12-16, 2024, SOCJ delved into the world of forensics and law enforcement. The week-long event featured engaging activities, informative symposiums, and thrilling competitions designed to inspire the next generation of justice protectors.

highlights.title: Mr. & Ms. SOCJ 2024: Beauty and Bravery
highlights.text: History in the making! The aspiring candidates for the first-ever Mr. & Ms. SOCJ showcased their unique personalities and vibrant spirits. This event celebrates the balance of character, intelligence, and leadership in the field of Criminology.

name: School of Business Management
description: Empowering future leaders through innovative business strategies and entrepreneurial excellence.
achievements: Champion: College Week Lip Sync Showdown 2026

highlights.title: Yellow Falcons Win Lip Sync Showdown
highlights.text: The Yellow Falcons brought cartoon adventure to life with a Dora the Explorer concept, creatively 'exploring' the houses of animated characters. Their imaginative theme and energetic choreography drew the loudest cheers in the arena.

highlights.title: College Week 2026: Grand Foot Parade
highlights.text: SOBM showcased massive institutional pride during the Foot Parade on February 23. Our official muses, escorts, and student leaders led the march from the Esplanade, radiating unity and the SOBM spirit.

highlights.title: Preparation for WVRAA 2026
highlights.text: SOBM faculty and student volunteers joined forces during the College Do-Day to prepare facilities for the Aklan delegates. Our spirit of teamwork ensures a hospitable stay for our visiting athletes.

name: School of Hospitality Management
description: World-class training in culinary arts, hotel operations, and global tourism management.
achievements: Dean Jojo Tibang: VP of CHEDRO6 Council of Deans
Official Catering Partner for ALCOR VI Events

highlights.title: Hotel Familiarization at Park Inn by Radisson
highlights.text: First-year BSHM students participated in an immersive hotel familiarization at Park Inn by Radisson, Iloilo City on March 11, 2026, bridging classroom theory with world-class industry standards.

highlights.title: Dean Tibang Inducted as CHEDRO6 Vice President
highlights.text: A leadership milestone: Dr. Jojo L. Tibang has been officially inducted as Vice President (LUC Representative) for the Council of Deans for Hospitality and Tourism Education (CHEDRO6) for 2025–2028.

highlights.title: SOHM Interns Deploy to Boracay
highlights.text: Our 4th-year BSHM students were deployed to the world-renowned Boracay Island on January 10, 2026. Ready to gain hands-on experience in one of the world's top tourism destinations!

highlights.title: Community Unity: WVRAA Do-Day & Kapistahan
highlights.text: From leading campus-wide preparations for the WVRAA Meet to proudly representing PCC in the Kapistahan 2026 Opening Program, SOHM continues to be an integral part of Passi City's traditions.

name: School of Teacher Education
description: Nurturing the next generation of educators with high moral standards and pedagogical excellence.

highlights.title: PCC Hinampang 2026: Compete, Thrive, Achieve
highlights.text: At the City of Passi Arena (COPA), SOTE students ignited the spirit of excellence during the opening of Hinampang 2026. From the vibrant foot parade to the electrifying cheer dance and dancesport performances, the arena roared with school pride.

highlights.title: SOTE Shines in 18th Statistical Analysis Contest
highlights.text: Justin A. Salutin and Jhon Loyd M. Centina secured 3rd Place in the CHED Regional Office VI competition. This achievement showcases the exceptional analytical skills and dedication of our future educators.

highlights.title: Leading the Spirit of Patriotism
highlights.text: The School of Teacher Education successfully led the first flag-raising ceremony of 2026. This event highlights our school's commitment to fostering a deep love for country and unity within the academic community.

highlights.title: Standing Together: End VAW Campaign
highlights.text: SOTE stood at the forefront of the 18-Day Campaign to End Violence Against Women. Led by Dr. Janice Jennifer P. Palmares and our GAD coordinators, we strengthened our commitment to a safe and inclusive institution.
